candidate_definition_hints.text: Staging area for Claude Code bug reports and feature requests before filing upstream at anthropics/claude-code
Staging area for Claude Code issues before filing upstream at [anthropics/claude-code](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues), plus a backfill of items already filed.
